creator: rometravelers
caption:
Did you know about this Inside Out inspired restaurant in Rome? ✨

Great atmosphere, beautiful presentation, and one of those spots that makes an evening in Rome feel extra special. They all have beautiful themed rooms you can pick where to sit based on how you feel and their menu is inspired by Pixar’s Inside Out. 🥹✨

Everything we ate from their Inside Out Summer menu 👇🏼

💛Joy - fettuccine pasta 

🖤 Fear - dessert 

💚Envy - Vegetarian Pizza 

❤️ Anger - tomato Pizza 

🤎 Disgust - fried oyster 

💙Anxiety ( surprise dish you won’t know until you order! But delicious 😋) 

Save and share with a friend you want to go with!
